Saturn is in the second house

Guru-Ciuiiidala Yoga occurs. This
Moon Mer-.
indicates that the native will be a
stubborn person and he would have
passed his early days in the company
of low people.
Although Mercury is exalted the native's education will be
incomplete. The native's life till his 27th year will be miserable. Then,
he will start selling medicines and will earn well. This is indicated
by Saturn in Gemini which is Mercury's house indicating commerce
and trade. Jupiter and Rahu are in the next house which indicates
that the things dealt with will contain essences of drugs and chemicals.
The native will have a very prosperous period after his 35th year.
